write.seoDesc: Search words, syllables, and rhymes; draft lyrics with the PoetryHub lexicon tool.
write.publishDesc: Your poem will be added to the PoetryHub collection and visible to all readers.
write.fieldAuthorNameHint: Name that will appear on the poem page.
write.loginRequired: You must be signed in to publish a poem.

carousel.seoDesc: Turn any poem into a 1080×1350 (4:5) Instagram post: themes, typography, PNG export, and captions.
carousel.title: Insta post
carousel.subtitle: Design multi-slide posts from your text or the library. Export crisp PNGs and a ready-made caption.
carousel.poemDataStaffOnly: Poem text and author details can only be edited by moderators and administrators. The last-slide message is set in the admin panel. You can still change theme, font, verse layout, keywords, and export below. Open a poem with ?slug=… or use the sample loaded for preview.
carousel.fieldKeywords: Highlight words or phrases you liked from the poem (comma-separated)
carousel.keywordsHelp: These words or short phrases are highlighted on body slides: if a verse line contains a match, it appears with a colored background (the exact style depends on the theme). Separate entries with commas or semicolons. Matching ignores upper/lower case. Leave empty for no extra highlighting.
carousel.fontCarouselHint: Pick a typeface for slides. When you save, settings apply only to the poem you opened from the library.
carousel.exportHint: Generates one PNG per slide at 1080×1350 (4:5). ZIP includes every slide in order.
carousel.exportError: Export failed. Try again or check the browser console.
carousel.needTitleBody: Please enter a title and poem text.
carousel.splitInfo: Body split into {n} slides (plus cover & outro).
carousel.samplePoem:
To noapte bună, stea strălucitoare,
Care din depărtare vestejind ne-ai dat,
Că lumea ta e plină de-un mister uimitor,
Și totuși ești singură pe bolta înălțată.

Afară luna trece, plină de lumină,
Și norii fug ușor pe boltă rătăciți,
Eu singur în genunchi, cu ochii spre tine,
Te-ntreb: din milioane, pe care mă iubești?
carousel.defaultsSaveError401: Could not save — you are not signed in from this address. Sign in again, and use the same URL you used to log in (localhost and 127.0.0.1 are different for cookies).
carousel.defaultsSaveError403: Only the configured site owner account can save Insta post settings for a poem.
carousel.saveCurrentPoemCarousel: Save Insta post for this poem
carousel.poemCarouselSaved: Insta post settings saved for this poem.
carousel.poemCarouselSaveError: Could not save Insta post settings for this poem. Try again.
carousel.poemCarouselSaveHintStaff: Saves poem text to the library, then theme, font, verse layout, CTA, and keywords for this poem (moderators and administrators).
carousel.poemCarouselSaveHintCarouselOnly: Saves theme, font, verse layout, and keywords for this poem only (poem text and last-slide message are staff-only).
carousel.poemSaveLoginHint: Sign in to save Insta post settings for poems you are allowed to edit.
carousel.poemSaveNeedPoemHint: Open a poem from the library (search or link with ?slug=) to save its Insta post settings.
carousel.poemSaveOwnerOnlyHint: Only an administrator or the member who published this poem can save or delete it here.
carousel.deletePoem: Delete this poem from the library
carousel.deletePoemConfirm: Delete this poem permanently from the database? This cannot be undone.
carousel.deletePoemError: Could not delete the poem. Try again.

footer.quote: "Poetry is the spontaneous overflow of powerful feelings" — Wordsworth

home.subtitle: Discover classic and contemporary poetry. Browse by mood, author, or let the verse find you.
home.sidebarLikedEmpty: Save poems with the heart on any card.
home.sidebarLikedMissing: Some favorites are no longer in the library.
home.featuredEmpty: No liked poems yet. Tap the heart on poem cards to save favorites — they count here.

authors.title: Authors
authors.bioUnavailable: No biography is available for this author yet. You can add one in the admin panel.

search.title: Search
search.tryBrowse: Try different keywords or browse by
search.prompt: Type to search the poetry collection.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.hint: Browse poems and tap ♡ to save
favorites.toggleError: Could not update favorites. Check your connection and try again.
favorites.clearError: Could not clear all favorites. Try again.
favorites.localOnlyHint: Favorites are saved on this device only.
favorites.signInToSync: Sign in to sync across devices
favorites.missingFromCatalog: Some saved poems are no longer in the collection. Remove them from your list by clearing favorites or unfavoriting on a poem page.

auth.googleErrorConfig: Google sign-in is not configured on this server.
auth.googleErrorInvalid: Something went wrong with the Google sign-in link. Try again.
auth.googleErrorState: Your sign-in session expired. Try signing in with Google again.
auth.googleErrorToken: Could not complete Google sign-in. Try again.
auth.googleErrorProfile: Could not load your Google profile. Try again.
auth.googleErrorUnverified: Your Google email must be verified before you can sign in.
auth.googleErrorGeneric: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use email and password.

account.title: Account
account.pageSubtitle: Manage your profile, security, and how poems look when you read.
account.profileError: Could not save profile. Try again.
account.googleOnlyPasswordHint: You signed in with Google. Set a password below if you also want to sign in with email.
account.passwordError: Could not update password. Check your current password and try again.
account.readingDesc: Set your default typeface and spacing for the poem reader.
account.notLoggedIn: You must be signed in to view this page.
account.poemsDesc: Poems you have published to the collection.
account.poemsEmpty: You haven't published any poems yet.
account.deleteAccountLead: Permanently delete your account, saved favorites, and your profile. Poems you published stay in the collection with no submitter link. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountOwnerNote: This owner account cannot be deleted from here.
account.deleteAccountModalBody: Enter your current password to confirm. Your account and favorites will be removed permanently.
account.deleteAccountModalBodyGoogle: Type your full email address to confirm. Your account and favorites will be removed permanently.
account.deleteAccountEmailRequired: Enter your email address to confirm.
account.deleteAccountWrongEmail: Email does not match your account.
account.deleteAccountForbidden: This account cannot be deleted here.
account.deleteAccountError: Could not delete account. Try again.

viewer.slideHint: {current} / {total} · Use ← → to navigate · Esc to exit
viewer.readingSettingsHint: Adjust typeface and size for comfortable reading.
viewer.fontDescGeorgia: Designed for screen legibility; also excellent in print, with high readability at small sizes.
viewer.fontDescGaramond: EB Garamond — widely used in literature; easy to read in long printed passages.
viewer.fontDescVerdana: Sans-serif with wide spacing and large characters, made for comfortable on-screen reading.
viewer.fontDescRoboto: Modern geometric sans-serif — approachable and clear, common for web reading.
viewer.fontDescHelvetica: Classic clean sans-serif; clear on both digital displays and in print.
viewer.fontDescBookerly: Amazon’s Bookerly is not licensed for the web. This option uses Literata and Merriweather for similar e-reader readability and lower eye strain.
viewer.prefsSavedHint: Signed in — your choices are saved to your account.
viewer.prefsLocalHint: Choices are saved on this device. Sign in to sync across devices.

seo.homeDesc: A modern platform to read, discover, and share poetry. Browse classic poems by mood, author, and theme.

instaPost.title: Insta post — last slide
instaPost.lead: The message on the final slide of exported Instagram posts (CTA). Only the site owner account can edit this text.
instaPost.placeholderCta: e.g. three lines — Visit / poetryhub.ro / for more poetry
instaPost.ownerOnly: Only the site owner can change the last slide message. Other carousel style defaults can still be changed on the public Insta post page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Tune layout, typography, and presentation settings for the public site. Four color schemes apply to the public site; visitors switch them from the footer.
settings.languageSwitchBody: When enabled, visitors see the language control in the site header and on login/sign-up. When disabled, the UI stays on the default locale with no switch.
settings.languageSwitchLabel: Show language switch on the public site
settings.schemesBody: Parchment is the default theme. Paper is a clean light theme. Ink is a dark reading theme. Sepia is warm. Qi is a warm ivory editorial palette inspired by magazine layouts. The choice is saved in this browser only.

quick.newPoemDesc: Add a poem to the collection
quick.enrichDatesDesc: Auto-fill written year via Wikipedia + AI

enrich.title: Enrich Poem Dates
enrich.desc: Automatically fetch the year each poem was written using Wikipedia and Claude AI. Runs in batches — click repeatedly until done.
enrich.done: All done — every poem has been processed.

users.title: Users
users.cannotChangeSelf: You cannot change your own role here.

poems.title: Poems
poems.confirmDelete: Delete this poem? This cannot be undone.

poemForm.title: Title
poemForm.author: Author
poemForm.contentHint: Separate stanzas with a blank line.
poemForm.featuredNew: Feature this poem on the homepage
poemForm.requiredFields: Title, content, and author are required.
poemForm.placeholderContent:
Two roads diverged in a yellow wood,
And sorry I could not travel both…

authors.title: Authors
authors.confirmDelete: Delete this author and all their poems?
authors.name: Name

import.title: Import poems
import.poetryDbDesc: Import poems from poetrydb.org — a free public poetry API with hundreds of classic poems.
import.roDesc: Import Romanian classical public-domain poetry — Eminescu, Coșbuc, Alecsandri, Goga, Bacovia. Already-imported poems are skipped automatically.
import.jsonDesc: Paste a JSON array of poem objects. Each must have title, content, and author. Optional: language, tags.
import.invalidJson: Invalid JSON — please check the format.
